detail: Cooling lockout remains the first decision layer once post-impulse board deterioration is confirmed.
A few strong rebound names inside weak breadth must not be upgraded into board revival.
Only broad board revival may release lockout discussion; isolated strength cannot.
Seed-level rebuild supervision regains meaning only after board-level unlock no longer vetoes it.
Hierarchy remains governance-only and does not authorize replay or live intraday execution binding.
